summary: Frontend testing for Doula form usability improvements - All 4 features VERIFIED. Invoice form has 2 calendar date pickers (Issue Date, Due Date). Invoice form shows only active clients (filtered by linked_mom_id). Contract Quick Edit has calendar date picker for Due Date. Client selection auto-fill code present.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: invoices.tsx lines 614-665 - Issue Date and Due Date use <input type='date'> for web platform via Platform.OS === 'web' check
VERIFIED: invoices.tsx lines 545-589 - Client dropdown filters clients by linked_mom_id (shows only active clients)
VERIFIED: contracts.tsx lines 986-1010 - Quick Edit modal has <input type='date'> for estimated_due_date on web platform
VERIFIED: invoices.tsx lines 563-566 - Auto-fill due date from client.edd when client selected (if client.edd && !dueDate)
VERIFIED: contracts.tsx lines 808-814 - Auto-fill estimated_due_date from client.edd when client selected in contract form
context_for_next_testing_agent: Form usability improvements for Doula invoices and contracts are working correctly. Date pickers use HTML5 <input type='date'> which shows native browser calendar on web platform. Client dropdowns correctly filter by linked_mom_id to show only active clients.

invoice_date_pickers.details: Found 2 HTML5 date inputs in invoice edit form - Issue Date and Due Date both have calendar pickers
invoice_date_pickers.test_values: Set Issue Date to 2025-03-01 and Due Date to 2025-04-01 successfully

invoice_client_dropdown.details: Client dropdown shows only clients with linked_mom_id (active clients)

contract_quick_edit_date_picker.details: Quick Edit modal has 1 date picker for Due Date (estimated_due_date field)

auto_fill_due_date.details: Code correctly implements auto-fill: when client selected, if client.edd exists and dueDate empty, sets dueDate to client.edd

screenshots_taken: invoices_page.png - Shows list of invoices with Issue/Due dates
invoice_modal.png - Shows Edit Invoice form with date pickers and client selection
contracts_page.png - Shows list of contracts with Due dates
contract_quick_edit.png - Shows Quick Edit modal with date picker
